name: Wrike
description: Connect to Wrike to sync folders, tasks, users, comments, and timelogs via the Wrike REST API v4.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Wrike app (Apps & Integrations → API → Create App).

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Wrike app.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: OAuth redirect URI registered with your Wrike app. Defaults to your Shielva callback URL.
